nasb.text: “Assyria is there and all her company; her graves are round about her. All of them are slain, fallen by the sword,

esv.text: “Assyria is there, and all her company, its graves all around it, all of them slain, fallen by the sword,

cnv.text: “亞述和它的軍隊都在那裡；他們的墳墓在它周圍；他們都是被殺死的，是倒在刀下的。

ccb.text: “亚述和她的大军都在那里，她周围是她大军的坟墓。他们都是丧身刀下的人。
